HEADING: AI Agents
INTRO_TEXT: AI agents watch for events in your community and respond. Give each agent a personality in its initial prompt, pick which events should trigger it, and it will use its available tools - posting comments, voting, moderating, awarding badges - to act on your behalf.
NO_AGENTS_MESSAGE: You haven't created any AI agents yet.
DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete this agent? Its run history will also be removed.
INTERNAL_NAME_HINT: Short identifier used in logs. Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores.
DISPLAY_NAME_HINT: Shown publicly when the agent posts a comment.
STATUS_OPTION_DISABLED_HINT: The agent is turned off and will not run.
STATUS_OPTION_DRY_RUN_HINT: The agent runs and logs what it would do, but takes no real action. Use this to tune the prompt before going live.
STATUS_OPTION_ENABLED_HINT: The agent takes real actions on comments and users.
MODEL_HINT: Pick the model this agent should use. The default follows whatever the server is configured to use.
BUDGET_HINT: Caps how much this agent can spend before it stops dispatching. Shown in your account currency.
DAILY_BUDGET_HINT: Leave blank for no daily cap. The agent pauses until midnight UTC once reached.
MONTHLY_BUDGET_HINT: Leave blank for no monthly cap. The agent pauses until the next calendar month once reached.
ALERT_THRESHOLDS_HINT: Billing admins get an email when spend crosses each checked percentage. Defaults to 80% and 100%.
INITIAL_PROMPT_HINT: System prompt defining the agent's personality, tone, and goals. Plain text, no template syntax.
INITIAL_PROMPT_PLACEHOLDER: You are a welcoming community moderator. Greet new commenters, steer conversation away from toxicity, and escalate spam.
CONTEXT_HINT: Include extra context in the prompt. More context makes decisions better but increases token cost per run.
CONTEXT_THREAD_LABEL: Include parent comment and prior replies in the same thread
CONTEXT_USER_HISTORY_LABEL: Include commenter's trust factor, account age, ban history, and recent comments
CONTEXT_PAGE_LABEL: Include page title, subtitle, description, and meta tags
CONTEXT_GUIDELINES_HINT: Optional policy text prepended to every prompt. Use this to describe your tenant's moderation rules so the agent can apply them consistently.
CONTEXT_GUIDELINES_PLACEHOLDER: No personal attacks. No political campaigning. Links to external sites are allowed only from verified users.
SCOPE_HINT: Optional. One URL pattern per line. The agent only runs on comments whose page URL matches one of these patterns. Use glob syntax: '/news/*' matches any page under /news. Leave blank to run on every page in this tenant.
LOCALES_HINT: Optional. Comma-separated locale IDs (for example: en_us, zh_cn). The agent only runs on comments whose detected locale is in this list. Leave blank to run on every locale.
TRIGGERS_HINT: Pick at least one event. The agent runs each time one occurs.
TRIGGER_COMMENT_VOTE_THRESHOLD: A comment crosses a vote threshold
TRIGGER_MODERATOR_SPAMMED_COMMENT: A moderator marks a comment as spam
TRIGGER_COMMENT_FLAG_THRESHOLD: A comment crosses a flag threshold
TRIGGER_NEW_USER_FIRST_COMMENT: A user posts their first comment on this site
TRIGGER_COMMENT_AUTO_SPAMMED: A comment is auto-captured as spam by the system
VOTE_THRESHOLD_HINT: The agent runs when a comment reaches this many net votes.
FLAG_THRESHOLD_HINT: The agent runs the moment a comment's flag count reaches exactly this value.
TRIGGER_DELAY_HINT: Optional. Wait this long after the trigger fires before running the agent. Useful for triggers like flagging where you want votes/reports to settle first. Leave blank or 0 to run immediately. Maximum 30 days.
ALLOWED_TOOLS_HINT: Control which actions this agent is allowed to take. Unchecked tools are hidden from the model entirely, not just gated behind approval. Leave 'Allow any tool calls' checked to keep the full toolset.
APPROVALS_HINT: Select actions that must be approved by a human before the agent executes them. Approvals only apply to tools the agent is allowed to invoke; disallowed tools are refused outright.
APPROVALS_EU_DSA_NOTICE: EU DSA Article 17: user suspensions require human review. "Ban a user" is locked on and cannot be fully automated in the EU region.
APPROVALS_EU_LOCKED_TOOLTIP: Locked on by EU DSA Article 17 - fully-automated bans are not permitted in the EU region.
NOTIFICATIONS_HINT: Who should be emailed when an approval is queued?
NOTIFY_MODE_ALL_ADMINS_HINT: Fan out to every account owner, admin, or comment moderator on this tenant.
NOTIFY_MODE_SPECIFIC_USERS_HINT: Only the users you pick below receive approval emails.
NOTIFY_USERS_HINT: Hold cmd/ctrl to select multiple users.
NOTIFY_NO_REVIEWERS: No admins or moderators available on this tenant yet.
NEVER_TRIGGERED_STAT: This agent has not been triggered yet.
NO_RUNS_MESSAGE: No runs yet for this agent.
NO_ACTIONS_MESSAGE: No actions were taken during this run.
NO_TRANSCRIPT_MESSAGE: No transcript was recorded for this run.
ANALYTICS_NO_DATA: No activity yet for this period.
ANALYTICS_PROMPT_COMPARISON_SOON: Prompt A/B comparison is coming soon.
ERROR_NAME_REQUIRED: Please provide both an internal name and a display name.
ERROR_TRIGGER_REQUIRED: Please select at least one trigger.
ERROR_VOTE_THRESHOLD_REQUIRED: Please set a vote threshold of 1 or more when the vote-threshold trigger is selected.
ERROR_FLAG_THRESHOLD_REQUIRED: Please set a flag threshold of 1 or more when the flag-threshold trigger is selected.
ERROR_TRIGGER_DELAY_INVALID: Please set a delay between 0 and 2,592,000 seconds (30 days).
ERROR_ALLOWED_ACTIONS_EMPTY: Select at least one tool, or check 'Allow any tool calls'.
ERROR_SCOPE_TOO_MANY: Too many URL patterns. Please list 50 or fewer.
ERROR_SCOPE_PATTERN_INVALID: One of the URL patterns is invalid. Patterns must use url-pattern glob syntax, for example '/news/*'.
ERROR_LOCALES_INVALID: One or more locale IDs are not recognized. Use IDs like en_us or zh_cn, comma-separated.
ERROR_NOT_FOUND: That agent could not be found.
ERROR_GENERIC: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.
ERROR_BILLING_INVALID: AI agents require valid billing on file. Please update your billing info to continue.
ERROR_NOT_IN_PLAN: Your current plan does not include AI agents. Please upgrade to enable them.
ERROR_AGENT_LIMIT_REACHED: You have reached the maximum number of agents for your plan.
